g.text: (5) Budget Over-Limit / Threshold Alerts — two mechanisms in Spendo
A) Alert after expense hits Budget row (signal)
filter + aggregate spent in budget window
B) Alert on dashboard load (Category.budgeted ≥ 90% spent)
(A) covers Tx create + Budget + Notification via signal;\n(B) covers GET dashboard + Tx/Cat queries + Notification persist.
